name: stellar-trade-agent
description: An OpenClaw-inspired AI trading agent that pays for market intelligence via x402 + MPP and trades autonomously on Stellar SDEX

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run mpp" "npm run x402" "npm run server" "npm run dashboard"
scripts.demo: concurrently --names MPP,X402,API,UI "npm run mpp" "npm run x402" "npm run server" "npm run dashboard"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../services/market-data && npm install && cd ../x402-intel-server && npm install && cd ../../frontend && npm install
